summary: AI Drum Machine MPC in your browser Discussion | Link
content: MCP2000 is an AI-powered MPC that lives in your browser. Type what you want to hear ("dusty boom bap kit with crunchy snares," "8-bar afro-house shaker loop at 120 BPM") and it generates the samples, drops them onto a 4x4 pad grid, and lets you finger-drum, chop, sequence, and add effects. No crate-digging, no plugins, no install. Just prompt, play, and build a beat.
chineseSummary: 浏览器中的 AI 鼓机 MPC 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: MCP2000 是一款位于浏览器中的人工智能驱动的 MPC。输入您想听到的内容（“带有松脆军鼓的尘土飞扬的boom bap套件”，“120 BPM的8小节非洲浩室摇摇器循环”），它会生成样本，将它们放到4x4的打击垫网格上，然后让您用手指敲鼓，切碎，排序并添加效果。无需挖箱子，无需插件，无需安装。只需提示、演奏并构建节拍即可。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
